docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $625.00 FILED BY SAUNDERS, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRIS WOOD--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -FEE FOR SERVICE: NOT PROVIDED ON PAGE 2 OF PROOF OF SERVICE- SERVED MAR-27-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-01-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAUNDERS, WESLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACTIVSPACE, LLC. $625.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $655.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
